product_overview: A web frontend for coaches, parents, and players to authenticate, manage teams and rosters, schedule and RSVP to events, and view league standings and match schedules. Focused on core free-plan functionality exposed at /login, /signup, /dashboard, /events, /leagues, and /roster.
core_goals: Allow users to create an account and sign in to access team features.
Let team members view and respond to scheduled events and see event details.
Provide a browsable league view showing standings and upcoming match schedules.
Enable staff to manage a team roster: view members, add new members, edit member info, and mark members removed.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Enable users to sign up and sign in with email/password so they can access protected team pages and their dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Click login/signup -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email and password -> Click login/signup -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill invalid email format -> Fill password -> Click login/signup -> See validation error about email format

features.name: Events Management
features.description: Browse scheduled events, open event details, RSVP or mark attendance, and (for staff) create events that appear in the team schedule.
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> View event list -> Open event details -> RSVP to event -> See RSVP reflected in event details
Navigate to /events -> Toggle between calendar and list view -> View event list in chosen view -> Open event details
Navigate to /events -> (Staff) Create new event -> Fill event details -> Save event -> See new event appear in event list

features.name: League standings & matches
features.description: View league standings and browse match schedules so users can see team positions and upcoming or past match results.
user_flows: Navigate to /leagues -> View standings table -> Select a match from schedule -> See match details and result
Navigate to /leagues -> View match schedule -> Filter or scan upcoming matches -> Open match details to inspect opponent and time

features.name: Roster management
features.description: Allow authorized staff to view and maintain the team roster and allow members/parents to view their own profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /roster -> View member list -> Select a member -> See member profile and status
Navigate to /roster -> View member list -> Add member -> Fill required member details -> Save member -> See new member appear in member list
Navigate to /roster -> Search and select a member -> Edit member details -> Save changes -> See updated member information
Navigate to /roster -> Select a member -> Remove member -> See member marked as removed
Navigate to /roster -> Add member -> Leave required name empty -> Save member -> See validation error about missing required fields

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup using Firebase Auth

features.name: Events Management
features.description: Create, view, and RSVP to team events

features.name: League Standing and Matches
features.description: View league standings and match results
